purpose: Inspect the nonselected companion path inside the best persistent source-only polarity family.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This inspects the extra companion path left by the non-generator boundary.
A candidate neighbouring projection-family clue is weaker than a generator.

boundary_record.short_form: The extra companion path was inspected but did not qualify as a neighbouring projection-family clue.
what_this_inspects: The single nonselected companion inside the best persistent source-only family.
Whether the companion shares source/projection features with the four selected correction paths.
what_this_does_not_do: It does not close Gap A.
It does not derive the WXYZTI generator.
It does not promote the companion to a proven projection member.
It does not attach physical interpretation.
boundary_record.next_question: The polarity branch should remain bounded unless another source-side object is found.

interpretation.main_result: The extra companion path was inspected but did not qualify as a neighbouring projection-family clue.
interpretation.why_this_matters: The nonselected path is the obstruction that kept the polarity family from becoming an exact generator. Inspecting it tells us whether the extra member is meaningful.
interpretation.why_not_closure: Projection visibility and feature similarity are not enough to derive the full source-native WXYZTI projection-family generator.
interpretation.next_move: The polarity branch should remain bounded unless another source-side object is found.

claim.short_form: The extra companion path was inspected but did not qualify as a neighbouring projection-family clue.
claim.not_closed_reason: Projection visibility and feature similarity are not enough to derive the full source-native WXYZTI projection-family generator.
claim.next_problem: The polarity branch should remain bounded unless another source-side object is found.
